word: G2085 - ἑτεροδιδασκαλέω - heterodidaskaléō - het-er-od-id-as-kal-eh'-o - Teach other doctrine

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἑτεροδιδασκαλέω

- Transliteration: heterodidaskaleo

- Phonetic: het-er-od-id-as-kal-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to teach other or different doctrine

a. deviating from the truth

- Origin: from G2087 and G1320

- TDNT entry: 04:43,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2087 and G1320; to instruct differently: - teach other doctrine (-wise).
